EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IGeoTransformationOperationSet2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that control a set of geographic and vertical transformation operators.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("61F5A2FD-1476-4E99-AF6A-77D7F9919083")]
public interface IGeoTransformationOperationSet2 : IGeoTransformationOperationSet

Properties

Count 

int Count { get; }

Property Value

int

HVCount

The number of HV transformations in the set.

int HVCount { get; }

Property Value

int
